releaseNotes: - AI Hook Creator with multi-provider model support
- Centralized AI hook service with automated validation & retry logic
- Prompt builder, API client, token estimation engine
- Obfuscation detection engine for APK analysis
- DexParser utility for APK method analysis
- AI provider resilience, stop button, UI redesign
- JSON IDE editor for BeanShell scripts
- Static method access: XposedHelpers & XposedBridge in BS
- Activity reference passed to BeanShell interpreter
- Log & toast helper methods in BS context
- Dynamic hook engine with ClassLoader interception
- Core Xposed hook engine for billing, license & stealth
- Modular private hook management & custom activity components
- HookEngine.java with full hook management logic
- Google Play Licensing Service emulation (LVL V1 & V2)
- Full Google Play Billing Library V5 spec compliance
- Subscription pricing not loading in GPBL v5+ (fixed)
- Billing management UI with database ops for purchase tracking
- StealthBypass module to block Xposed detection techniques
- Rotary context menu UI throughout the app
- Dashboard header with system diagnostics HUD
- Standardized ring animation & icon UX (About dialog style)
- Purchase page with responsive UI & payment integration
- BuyActivity with purchase dialog & konfetti animation
- File download helper with custom dialogs
- Comprehensive HTML help documentation for NFG Hook Engine
- Styled help doc with responsive sidebar navigation
- Multiple help.html revisions with modern interactive styling
- Workspace layout & navigation added to help
- NFG toast integration throughout the app
- Custom AppAdapter for dynamic list rendering
- AppList data model & adapter with status indicators
- RecyclerView adapters for kill detection, license & billing
